properties.verseOrder: V1 V2 V3 V4 V5 V6

verse.name: V1
verse.lines: /: Worthy is the Lamb who was slain Holy, holy is He Sing a new song to Him who sits on Heaven's mercy seat. :/

verse.name: V2
verse.lines: Holy, holy, holy is the Lord God Almighty Who was and is and is to come With all creation I sing: praise to the King of kings You are my everything and I will adore You

verse.name: V3
verse.lines: Clothed in rainbows of living color Flashes of lighting rolls of thunder Blessing and honor strength and glory and power be To You the only wise King

verse.name: V4
verse.lines: Holy, holy, holy is the Lord God Almighty Who was and is and is to come With all creation I sing: praise to the King of kings You are my everything and I will adore You

verse.name: V5
verse.lines: Filled with wonder, awestruck wonder At the mention of Your name. Jesus Your name is power, breath and living water Such a marvelous mystery.

verse.name: V6
verse.lines: Holy, holy, holy is the Lord God Almighty Who was and is and is to come With all creation I sing: praise to the King of kings You are my everything and I will adore You
